tilePanel.title: Edit Tile
tilePanel.paintHint: Click or drag tiles to paint with the selected brush.
tilePanel.noTileSelected: Select a tile to edit it

townPanel.title: Edit Town
townPanel.name: Name
townPanel.fortification_none_desc: An open settlement — no defences, easily taken.
townPanel.fortification_palisade_desc: A ring of sharpened wooden stakes. Fast to build, easy to burn.
townPanel.fortification_stone_desc: Dressed stone curtain wall. Costly to build, costly to breach.
townPanel.size_village_desc: A small farming community. A handful of buildings and a market day.
townPanel.size_town_desc: A proper settlement with craftsmen, a market, and a population of hundreds.
townPanel.size_city_desc: A major urban centre — the beating heart of the region.

factionPaintPanel.title: ⚑ Paint Faction
factionPaintPanel.hint: Select a faction below, then click or drag tiles to assign it.
factionPaintPanel.hintTouch: Select a faction below, then tap tiles to assign it.
factionPaintPanel.noFactions:
No factions yet.
Add some via ⚑ Factions in the settings menu.

factionsPanel.title: ⚑ Factions
factionsPanel.noFactions: No factions yet. Add one below.

armyPanel.title: ⚔ Army
armyPanel.name: Name
armyPanel.moveHint: Tap any tile on the map to move this army there. Pan and zoom work normally.

home.title: ⬡ Hex Map Tool
home.subtitle: Select a map to edit, or create a new one.
home.description: Design worlds and command armies. Build hex maps for wargames, campaigns, and strategic planning — place terrain, found towns, deploy forces, and trace the lines of battle. All rendered live as SVG, saved automatically in your browser.
home.noticeStorageTitle: Maps are stored in your browser's local storage.
home.noticeStorageBody: They will be lost if you clear your browser data, switch browsers, or use a different device. Use <bold>Export JSON</bold> inside the editor to save a backup, and <bold>Import JSON</bold> to restore it.
home.deleteConfirm: Delete this map? This cannot be undone.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.escape: Deselect tile or army; cancel move mode

terrainConfig.title: Terrain Types
terrainConfig.iconHint: Upload an SVG file to use as the icon for this terrain type.
terrainConfig.deepWaterHint: Merges edges with adjacent water tiles, suppresses river and road visuals, and enables ports on neighbouring town tiles.
terrainConfig.disableWarning: {{count}} tile(s) use this terrain. Disabling will hide it from the picker but won't delete tiles. Continue?
terrainConfig.deleteWarning: {{count}} tile(s) use this terrain. Delete those tiles too?

errorBoundary.title: ⚠ Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: An unexpected error occurred. Try reloading the page. If the problem persists, your map data may be corrupted.
